Notes: 3A synchronous buck 3.8V-32V internally compensated + internal soft-start 500kHz
Primary MCU 16MB quad flash + 8MB octal PSRAM PCB antenna variant
Radio coprocessor Zigbee/Thread/BLE + USB Serial-JTAG on IO26/IO27
Row 1 I2C level shifter DCT package only
24-ch 12-bit PWM constant-current LED driver (DAP thermal pad variant)
BLE state + GATT (H2 IO13 driven) - same blue part as LED_5 WiFi; firmware distinguishes by blink pattern
Addressable RGB position 1 (DIN from S3 IO21 via R_RGB_SER)
DNP default; populate if SK6812 V_IH fails logic-level qualification (JP_RGB_BYPASS 0 Ω shorts it out)
SW1 RESET_S3 debounce + ESD shunt (EN_S3_NODE to GND)
SW2 BOOT_S3 debounce + ESD shunt (BOOT_S3_BTN to GND)
Series resistor S3 IO11 to H2 EN
Series resistor S3 IO13 to H2 IO9
H2_IRQ pullup to 3V3 on S3 side
TLC5947 IREF - sets per-channel constant-current to ~15 mA
S3 IO21 to SK6812 DIN series - reflection damping
SK6812 strip 5V bulk at strip start
AP63300 bootstrap (between pins 6 BST and 1 SW)
